title: Örebro Cold Snap
lead: Örebro is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Örebro are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperature is causing a high demand for heating, resulting in a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 45%, and the wind speed is moderate at 4.7 km/h, contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Örebro.
